summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P2 features: Email Notifications via Resend, Session Recording Management, and Advanced Analytics. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including Session Records page, Analytics page with enrollment trend chart, and CSV export functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: email_notifications.py correctly implements branded HTML email templates with build_email_html()
send_email() uses asyncio.to_thread() for non-blocking Resend API calls
send_enrollment_email() and send_cohort_join_email() are properly async functions
courses.py enrollment trigger uses asyncio.create_task() for fire-and-forget email (non-blocking)
cohorts.py join trigger uses asyncio.create_task() for fire-and-forget email (non-blocking)
session_records.py correctly filters for status='ended' sessions only
session_records.py enriches host_name and attendee_details from users collection
PUT /api/session-records/{id}/notes correctly checks host_id or faculty+ permission
analytics.py enrollment-trends endpoint returns correct {date, enrollments} array for N days
analytics.py export/csv endpoint returns StreamingResponse with text/csv Content-Type
SessionRecordsPage.jsx has all required data-testid attributes (session-records-page, records-search, export-csv, edit-notes-btn, notes-textarea, save-notes-btn)
AnalyticsPage.jsx has all required data-testid attributes (analytics-page, enrollment-trend-chart, export-csv-btn, stat-cards, users-by-role, course-performance)
Sidebar.jsx correctly shows Session Records link only for faculty+ users (facultyOnly: true)

test_credentials.test_users_created: P2_TEST_ prefixed users via MongoDB for backend tests, ui_test_ prefixed users for frontend tests (all cleaned up)

seed_data_creation: Test users with faculty role and elder_circle tier created via MongoDB for testing. Test live sessions with status='ended' created for session records testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 tested P2 features: (1) Email Notifications via Resend - POST /api/notifications/email/test sends branded HTML email (may fail in test mode due to unverified domain, but endpoint works). Enrollment and cohort join triggers send emails via asyncio.create_task() (non-blocking). (2) Session Recording Management - GET /api/session-records lists ended sessions with host info. GET /api/session-records/{id} returns detail with attendee_details. PUT /api/session-records/{id}/notes saves notes/takeaways/tags (faculty+ or host only). GET /api/session-records/{id}/export returns CSV-friendly data. (3) Advanced Analytics - GET /api/analytics/enrollment-trends?days=N returns daily enrollment counts. GET /api/analytics/export/csv returns CSV file with course performance. GET /api/analytics/dashboard still works (regression). (4) Frontend - SessionRecordsPage at /session-records with search, detail view, notes editing, CSV export. AnalyticsPage has enrollment trend bar chart and CSV export button. Sidebar shows Session Records link for faculty only.
